_publications._publicationTitle: Functional interactions between neurofibromatosis tumor suppressors underlie Schwann cell tumor de-differentiation and treatment resistance.

_contextSnippet: Immunoblotting of neurofibroma cell lysates after selumetinib treatment showed initial repression of ERK phosphorylation (pERK) and early induction of apoptosis (cleaved Caspase-3, cleaved Caspase-7), followed by recovery of pERK
details: 1 μM selumetinib treatment transiently inhibited pERK and induced pMEK and apoptosis over time, followed by recovery of pERK with no change in total protein or mRNA of Ras pathway effectors in cells that persisted despite continued treatment
